name: V 24 (BSZS) IGP2 Gemma Vom Frankengold
subtitle: “a” normal, elbows normal
description: Gemma is a world class female that placed V24 in 2019 at the German Sieger Show. She is a vital part of our breeding program. She has produced puppies that have excellent temperament that have been suitable for both show, working and family companions.

name: Quinoa Dei Precision
subtitle: “a” normal, elbows normal
description: Quinoa is a beautiful black and red female with an excellent temperament. She will be the future of our breeding program. Quinoa is a Gary Huhnegrab granddaughter and her mother is out of VA8 Jax Dei Precision.
dam: SG BSZS ADEL WESTBACK IGP! KKl

name: SG1 Clarot's Alie
description: Alie is a long coat female that shows to be very promising at this young age. She is out of our newest import Gemma Vom Frankengold IGP 1. We are looking forward to showing her in the upcoming shows.
dam: V24( BSZS) Gemma Vom Frankengold IGP 2
sire: VA1 Oargos Dei Precision IGP 3 KKL

name: SG1 Clarot's Ben
description: Ben is a gorgeous long coat Male. He has super Blk and red pigmentation, dark mask, excellent bone and overall amazing temperament. He is now 3 x SG1 in his early show career. His future is very bright.
sire: V7 BSZS 2019, VA4 ITA V(BSZS) Falco von Farhantal

name: SG1 Clarot's Brooke
description: Brooke is a beautiful black and red female with excellent anatomy and super temperament. Wonderful addition for our future breeding program.
sire: V7 BSZS 2019, VA4 ITA V(BSZS) Falco von Farhantal
